evals.prompt: Add structured data to my blog posts with Article schema and breadcrumbs
evals.expected_output: Creates JSON-LD components with Article and BreadcrumbList schemas, type-safe with schema-dts
expectations: Creates a reusable JsonLd component with XSS sanitization (.replace(/</g, '\u003c'))
Creates schema factory functions using schema-dts types (WithContext<Article>)
Adds Article schema with headline, datePublished, dateModified, author, image
Adds BreadcrumbList schema with proper position numbering
Places sitewide schemas (Organization, WebSite) in root layout
Places page-specific schemas (Article, BreadcrumbList) in page component
Does NOT use FAQPage schema (restricted to gov/health since 2023)
